title: An EDNS(0) Option to Negotiate Leases on DNS Updates
source: Extensions for Scalable DNS Service Discovery
abstract: This document describes an EDNS(0) option that can be used between DNS Update Requesters and authoritative DNS servers to include a lifetime (lease duration) in a DNS Update or DNS Update Response, allowing a server to garbage collect stale Resource Records that have been added by DNS Updates if they are not renewed.
